name: CANADIAN TIRE CORP.LTD.CL
summary: CANADIAN TIRE CORP.LTD.CL is a Canadian retail company operating a diverse portfolio of businesses which includes Canadian Tire, a general merchandise retailer; PartSource, an automotive parts retailer; and Mark's, an apparel and footwear retailer. The company also provides financial services through Canadian Tire Bank and owns CT REIT, a real estate investment trust. Canadian Tire is headquartered in Toronto, Ontario.
